# Personal Data Protection Act, 2022

Jurisdiction: Tanzania
Region: TZ
Citation: Personal Data Protection Act, 2022
Authority: Personal Data Protection Commission Tanzania
Source URL: https://www.pdpc.go.tz/
Topics: consent, notice_transparency, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, cross_border_transfer, security_breach
Keywords: Tanzania Personal Data Protection Act, PDPC Tanzania, personal data

## Summary
Tanzania's personal data protection law with commission oversight, registration, lawful processing, rights, sensitive data, and transfer controls.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess registration and lawful processing requirements.
- Support data subject rights and notices.
- Control sensitive data and cross-border transfers.
